title: Settings
comingSoonSwitchLanguage:
Language switching will be available soon.
You'll be able to choose from a growing list of supported languages.
comingSoonFontSize:
Custom font size controls are being crafted.
Soon you'll be able to adjust text sizing to your preference.
comingSoonAppIcon:
Custom app icon selection is coming soon.
You'll be able to choose from a variety of icon styles.
comingSoonResetPassword:
Password reset functionality will be available soon.
You'll be able to securely change your account password.
comingSoonActiveSessions:
Session management is coming soon.
You'll be able to view and manage your active sessions and devices.
comingSoonDeleteAccount:
Account deletion will be available soon.
You'll be able to permanently delete your account and all associated data.
comingSoonBlockedUsers:
Blocked users management is coming soon.
You'll be able to view and manage your blocked users and personas.
comingSoonManageSubscription:
Subscription management is coming soon.
You'll be able to view and modify your subscription plan.
comingSoonRestorePurchases:
Purchase restoration is coming soon.
You'll be able to restore your previous in-app purchases.
comingSoonHelpCenter:
The help center is being built.
Soon you'll find answers to common questions and detailed guides.
comingSoonReportBug:
Bug reporting will be available soon.
You'll be able to submit detailed bug reports directly from the app.
comingSoonTermsOfService: Terms of service will be displayed here soon.
comingSoonPrivacyPolicy: The privacy policy will be available here soon.
comingSoonStreamingResponses:
Streaming responses let the AI reply token by token in real time.

When enabled, you'll see responses appear word-by-word as they're generated — creating a natural, conversational feel. When disabled, the full response is delivered all at once.

This page will offer a toggle and a live preview so you can experience the difference.
pinSetupSubtitle: Your device doesn't support biometric authentication. Set a 4-6 digit PIN to lock the app.
pinMinLength: PIN must be at least 4 digits
pinMismatch: PINs do not match. Please try again.
biometricLockEnabledDesc: App will lock when sent to background
biometricAvailableHint: Use fingerprint or face to unlock the app when it returns from background.
biometricUnavailableHint: Your device does not support biometric authentication. A PIN will be used instead.
